rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount is unrelated to Elec. Code §272.011, which governs bilingual election materials in political subdivisions. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 272.011. BILINGUAL ELECTION MATERIALS REQUIRED IN CERTAIN POLITICAL SUBDIVISIONS.
_note: No conflict. The cited rule concerns bilingual election materials and has no bearing on homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
